text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I gaze through the glass into this space of ideas. The atmosphere is clean and bright, structured yet inviting. Entering the R+D area, I'm surrounded by words that probe at vulnerability and perception. The language speaks directly to my own uncertainties; I feel exposed and contemplative, as if the room itself is inviting me to question my own intentions and the ways I interact with others. This environment, filled with reflections both literal and figurative, makes me more aware of myself and my surroundings, a participant in both research and self-discovery.
